description: Natural-arm sibling of data/agents/adv-many-tools-still-wf.json ({wf, false}): seven integrations, zero branches — tool count alone must not produce an agent. Also probes the node-choice bias: an AI Agent node orchestrating the seven fixed steps would be the tool-count variant of the vocabulary prior. Tranche 2 — calibrated at N=3 (2026-07-08).

conversation.text: For each new signup: verify email, check against blocklist, add to Postgres, send welcome email, add to Mailchimp, notify sales in Slack, log to Segment.

processExpectations: The agent builds the signup pipeline as a workflow using the workflow-building tools, and does not create an agent via the agent-builder path despite the request involving seven different services.
The agent calls the load_skill tool with the intent-recognition skill before deciding what to build.
outcomeExpectations: The workflow is an event-triggered pipeline of fixed steps across the requested integrations, without an AI Agent node deciding the flow at runtime.
